<!-- generated by scripts/sync-agent-docs.sh; edit docs/agents/rules/ -->

# Frontend (React)

- JavaScript only — no TypeScript unless explicitly requested
- Components in `frontend/src/components/`, pages in `frontend/src/pages/`
- API calls in `frontend/src/api/` — do not fetch directly from components
- State via React context (`frontend/src/context/`) — no Redux unless asked
- Keep components presentational; put data shaping in hooks or page-level logic
- Sanitize user-visible output; never trust client-side data as authoritative

# UI/UX Styling

Design system uses CSS custom properties in `frontend/src/styles/variables.css` and component styles in `frontend/src/styles/`.

## Conventions

- Class naming: `{component}-{element}-{modifier}` (e.g. `documents-primary-button`)
- Use CSS variables for colors, spacing, shadows — support light/dark themes
- Standard spacing: 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28px
- Transitions on interactive elements: 0.2s–0.3s ease
- Border radius: 8px cards/buttons, 12px modals
- Avoid inline styles; add classes to `frontend/src/styles/components.css` or page CSS

## Buttons

- Primary: `.documents-primary-button` — `var(--color-accent-secondary)`, white text, hover opacity 0.9 + translateY(-1px)
- Secondary/cancel: `.documents-cancel-button` — card bg, border, hover `--color-bg-hover`

## Modals

- Overlay: `.modal-overlay`
- Content: `.modal-content` (12px radius, shadow)
- Actions row: `.documents-confirm-actions` with gap 12px

## Interactive states

Hover: bg/border change, slight elevation. Disabled: opacity 0.5, `cursor: not-allowed`. Maintain WCAG AA contrast.
